explanation: Subway, Cavern, Mine, and Bunker are all structures or spaces typically found primarily or exclusively underground. An Attic is an upper part of a building, located above ground.

category: Prominent Greek Deities of Sea and Water
explanation: Poseidon is the Olympian god of the sea, Triton is his son and a merman, Oceanus is a Titan god of the primordial ocean, and Nereus is an elder sea god. Hades is the god of the Underworld, not primarily associated with the sea or water.
Meter, Second, Ampere, and Kelvin are all SI (International System of Units) base units. Acre is a unit of area, but it is not an SI base unit; it is an imperial unit.
